Paper: Deep Active Inference and Scene Construction.
DOI: 10.3389/frai.2020.509354
Abstract: Adaptive agents must act in intrinsically uncertain environments with complex latent structure. Here, we elaborate a model of visual foraging-in a hierarchical context-wherein agents infer a higher-order visual pattern (a "scene") by sequentially sampling ambiguous cues.
